reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: A few of the staff did not speak English, but still gave a full effort to understand our needs and assist us with booking travel, tours, and taxis. They were incredibly helpful despite our language barrier and we did not run into any issues with this. There was another staff member that spoke great English that was at the desk when our friends were checking out a day before us. Great laundry service.
reviews.negatives: The hotel itself was wonderful-- great AC, comfortable beds, lovely staff. However, it is about a 20-minute walk from the main town, and there are very very few dining options closer to the hotel. Generally, this is a lovely walk and not an issue, but we had some bad weather during our stay and it was terrible trying to get out to get food. Just a heads up!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Exceptional hotel for its price. We considered 2 more other hotels at first but ended up staying here and didn't regret one bit. 
Booked 2 double bed rooms for a night, the price was just 1/3 compared to our 2 initial choices and the photos looked pretty decent so we went for it. The rooms were not something you'd normally find at this budget, pretty comfortable and fancy-looking.
The receptionist was also nice enough to run up and down several times to ask if the room was too cramped for our family and gave us a free upgrade to triple bed rooms, which indeed felt nice and plenty spacious.
reviews.negatives: Didn't like the trash can for toilet paper in the bathroom, it looked cheap and out of place.

reviews.title: Double room for 2 people.
reviews.text: Ks is located on Tan Lo Kieu Huong, right between Sam Mountain and Chau Doc, making it convenient for trips to either location. The price is 250 per night for a double bed for 2 people, and it is very clean. It provides shampoo, shower gel, and toothbrushes for guests, and importantly, there is a small mirror for guests to do their makeup, which is very convenient. It's cheap, clean, and the staff is very friendly; when checking out, they don’t even need to check for any damage 😂. There is also a parking place for cars right under the hotel. I will come back next time.

reviews.title: Good, clean hotel.
reviews.text: A good place to stay, fully equipped rooms, new and clean rooms, clean sanitation, and a full hot water heater in the bathroom. The accommodation is close to the temple, making it very convenient for worship. There is a private parking area right in front of the house, with enough space for a 16-seat vehicle. The hotel has an elevator and offers motorcycle rental support as well. Convenient for going out and for worship. Family-friendly. Next door, there is a coffee shop with takeout for just 10,000 VND. Very cheap. The hotel provides bottled water and has a cold water dispenser for drinking. Overall, extremely satisfied. The price is very reasonable. I will return if I visit the temple again next time.

reviews.title: Avis mitigé
reviews.positives: Avis mitigé. La chambre était très bien par contre le personnel... très désagréable, jamais un sourire, ne parlent pas anglais, je demande du papier toilette elle m'a regardé hyper mal. On avait réservé avec eux un bus et ferry pour aller à phu quoc arrivé là on nous annonce à 6h du matin que il n'y a pas de ferry à ha tien car mauvais temps, je demande si il y a d'autres ferry ou solutions on me répond que non, à deux doigts de pleurer parce que on avait prévu de faire le 24 là bas et la réceptionniste se marre avec sa collègue en nous regardant. On a quand même décidé d'aller à ha tien pour voir parce que on avait déjà réservé notre hôtel la bas, et comme de par hasard si il y avait bien des ferry, mais pas des fast boat comme on nous proposait (30mn de plus, c'est rien!) Et on a payé 185 VND la traversée et non 250 VND comme proposé à l'hôtel... donc vraiment pas arrangeants et pas sympathiques.

reviews.title: Disponibilità e gentilezza genuina vietnamita
reviews.positives: La gentilezza e la disponibilità dei proprietari è incredibile, la camera è spaziosa, pulita e con ogni tipo di servizio. L'aria condizionata funziona bene e, essendo poco fuori dal centro città ma molto vicini al monte Sam, l'hotel mette a disposizione ottimi scooter a noleggio per soli 150.000 Dong. Lo staff non parla inglese ma state tranquilli, sapranno aiutarvi in ogni cosa. Organizzano bus per voi e sono sempre a disposizione. Se volete un'esperienza autentica e con il giusto comfort potete scegliere tranquillamente questo hotel e non ve ne pentirete

reviews.title: Waardeloos. Zelden zo slecht meegemaakt. Gewoon overslaan is ons advies
reviews.positives: Is een flink stuk verwijderd van het centrum. Maar dat is niet het ergste. Ze spreken bijna geen woord Engels dus handen en voetenwerk. Ergste was dat ze gewoon onze gereserveerde kamer hadden weggegeven.
reviews.negatives: Geen engels, administratie was waardeloos. De gereserveerde kamers was weggegeven. Ze regelden een kamer in het hotel ernaast. Die was bijna leeg (we waren de enige gasten op de hele verdieping!) en de reden was: smerige kamer, spijkerharde bedden met vies beddengoed, we sliepen in onze slaapzakhoezen. De volgende ochtend gevraagd of ze wisten waar het busstation was. Zelfs met vertaalapp kregen we alleen glazige blikken. Kost niet veel maar is ook echt helemaal niets

何よりスタッフがみな愛想が良くとても親切で、翌日のバス移動の際にわざわざバス会社に電話をかけピックアップの手配をしてくれました。
本当にお世話になりました。
